content:
The Angular community is pushing boundaries! From building “Mind Palaces” with AI to running LLMs directly in your browser for free, these resources showcase how to build smarter, more accessible, and more beautiful applications.
Check out these latest highlights:
Angular Signal Forms: Auto-Style States with Custom CSS
Fanis Prodromou @prodromouf shows you how to take your UI to the next level. Learn how to automatically style your form states using the new Signal Forms API and custom CSS for a seamless user experience.

• Watch the styling guide: https://youtu.be/ovkyPlfAyzs
Mind Palace AI: Cognitive Training with Angular & Gemini 3.0
Daniel Herrera Sanchez @weincoder demonstrates a fascinating use case for AI! See how Angular and Gemini 3.0 come together to create a cognitive training app designed to help users build a digital “Mind Palace.”

• Watch the demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zy3VJy_PCY4&t=2s
Avoiding Hallucinations with Gemini CLI
Working with AI requires precision. Mariano Alvarez @marianocodes provides a practical guide on how to reduce AI hallucinations and get more accurate code results when building Angular apps with the Gemini CLI.

• Read the technical tips: https://dev.to/marianocodes/reduce-hallucinations-when-working-on-a-angular-and-gemini-cli-42da
Gemini: Local and Free with Chrome and Angular
Did you know you can run AI locally? Mariano Alvarez @marianocodes explains how to leverage Chrome’s built-in AI capabilities to run Gemini for free within your Angular applications, ensuring data privacy and no API costs.

• Learn how: https://dev.to/marianocodes/gemini-locally-and-free-with-chrome-and-angular-474l
Photo Editing with Nano Banana & Firebase AI
Connie Leung @connieleung404 shares a powerful code sample for a photo editing app. It utilizes Google Nano Banana and Firebase AI Logic to bring advanced image processing to the Angular frontend.

• Explore the repo: https://github.com/railsstudent/ng-firebase-ai-nano-banana/
AI Alt Text & Text-to-Speech Generator
Accessibility meets innovation! Connie’s (@connieleung404) second code sample demonstrates how to build an Alt Text generator that finds obscure facts and uses Gemini 2.5 Flash TTS to speak them aloud.

• Check out the hybrid demo: https://github.com/railsstudent/firebase-ai-hybrid-demo
Are you experimenting with local AI or building accessibility tools with Gemini? Your work could be exactly what another developer needs to see.
Keep the knowledge spreading! Use #AngularSparkles and #AngularAI to share your latest repos and tutorials.
AI Training, Local Gemini, and Styling Signal Forms 🧠🎨 was originally published in Angular Blog on Medium, where people are continuing the conversation by highlighting and responding to this story.
